name: Ulrich von Hutten: What Comes After the Bell
description:
"Can I stay with you today? I promise I’ll make it up to you."

After being send to school by Friedrich, Ulrich sees the saving grace that could help her. You. Pulling you into an alleyway, Ulrich is to repay you for your kindness if you keep her hidden...

A request from a friend. At first I didn't know how to properly implement the school outfit in an scenario. This one is a bit shorter and sweeter and I hope you like it.

Avatar Picture

Tags: KMS Ulrich von Hutten, Azur Lane, School girl
creator: Endivick
